title: OverSpec Spec Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating OverSpec spec.yaml files — modular, versioned, distributable packages of agents/tasks/workflows.

name.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for the spec.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this spec covers.

domain.description: The domain this spec belongs to (e.g., software-engineering, data-science).

author.description: Author or team who created the spec.

license.description: License under which the spec is distributed.

overspec_min_version.description: Minimum OverSpec framework version required to use this spec.

icon.description: Emoji or icon representing this spec.

tags.description: Searchable tags for discovery and categorization.

components.description: References to all agents, tasks, workflows, and templates included in this spec.

agents.description: List of agent definition file paths relative to the spec.

tasks.description: List of task definition file paths relative to the spec.

workflows.description: List of workflow definition file paths relative to the spec.

templates.description: List of template file paths relative to the spec.

config.description: Configuration for how this spec integrates with others.

extends.description: How this spec interacts with existing configurations. 'extend' merges, 'override' replaces, 'none' is standalone.

phases_override.description: Custom phase order. Null means use the default phases from the base spec.

dependencies.description: External dependencies required by this spec.

specs.description: Other specs that must be loaded before this one (format: name@version).

tools.description: External tools required (e.g., CLI tools, runtimes).
